blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The browser surface exposes manual proto-persona creation but no JSON import UI or imported persona example, so the json_import source-type behavior is not user-testable here.
Visible navigation only reaches the demo study persona-review route with 3 sample variants; no live 64-variant study cohort can be created from the current user surface.
The UI shows Created by and Last updated, but it does not expose modifier identity or cross-user attribution needed to validate creator/modifier audit behavior from the browser surface.
